headline: Can Constellation Energy's Diverse Power Fleet Drive Future Growth?
summary: CEG's 55-GW diversified fleet and planned capacity additions position it to meet rising clean power and data center demand.

headline: Should You Invest in Vistra (VST) Based on Bullish Wall Street Views?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Vistra (VST) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: The Consortium Fueling The Nuclear Renaissance
summary: DOE approved the Nuclear Fuel Cycle Consortium Voluntary Agreement. Major participants in the consortium include Solstice Advanced Materials, Mirion Technologies and Amentum. Read more here.
